leadText: Stamina redirects here. For other uses, see Stamina (disambiguation). Stamina (Japanese: じきゅうりょく Stamina) is an Ability introduced in Generation VII. Prior to Generation IX, it was the signature Ability of Mudbray and Mudsdale.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokémon with Stamina is hit by an attack, its Defense rises by one stage. If a Pokémon with this Ability is hit by a multistrike move (such as Fury Swipes ), each hit activates this Ability. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Stamina has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokémon with Stamina is hit by an attack, its Defense rises by one stage. If a Pokémon with this Ability is hit by a multistrike move (such as Fury Swipes ), each hit activates this Ability.
